tools.name: get_alert_level_info
tools.description: Get explanation of GDACS alert level classifications and their meanings.

tools.name: search_events
tools.description: Search for disaster events with various filters. Returns a list of events matching the criteria, ordered by date descending.

tools.name: get_disaster_statistics
tools.description: Get disaster statistics aggregated by event type and alert level for a specified time period.

tools.name: get_events_by_country
tools.description: Get all disaster events affecting a specific country.

tools.name: get_event_data
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific disaster event. Returns event data including location, severity, affected population, and timeline.

tools.name: get_recent_alerts
tools.description: Get list of recent disaster alerts from the last N hours.

tools.name: get_active_disasters
tools.description: Get currently active disasters. Returns events with their geographic footprints grouped by disaster type.

tools.name: get_event_types
tools.description: Get list of all supported disaster event types with their descriptions.
